sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.* FROM (SELECT *,@rownum:=@rownum+1 as rowNum FROM tbl_usermaster, (select @rownum:=0) tmp WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND (DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME ASC)A
WHERE rowNum > #rowNum#
LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND (DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME ASC
SELECT * FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND cn = #userID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, CASE WHEN (USEFLAG = '' OR USEFLAG IS NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, CASE WHEN (USEFLAG = '' OR USEFLAG IS NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 IN (SELECT C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER C WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptID#) ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

sqlMap.select: SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, CASE WHEN (USEFLAG = '' OR USEFLAG IS NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #deptID# ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

select.isEqual:
(SELECT CN as userID, CN as deptID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END userName, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END deptName, '' as TITLE, MAIL, null as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 'deptImage.hyj' as imageName, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #deptID#, '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT CN as userID, DEPARTMENT as deptID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END userName, DESCRIPTION as deptName, TITLE, MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as imageName, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #deptID#, '%') OR DESCRIPTION$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #deptID#, '%')) AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.CN as userID, DEPARTMENT as deptID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END userName, DESCRIPTION as deptName, A.TITLE, MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as imageName, B.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE (B.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #deptID#, '%') OR B.DESCRIPTION$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #deptID#, '%')) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, userName
select.isNotEqual:
(SELECT CN as userID, CN as deptID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END userName, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END deptName, '' as TITLE, MAIL, null as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 'deptImage.hyj' as imageName, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #deptID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT CN as userID, DEPARTMENT as deptID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END userName, DESCRIPTION as deptName, TITLE, MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as imageName, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #deptID# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.CN as userID, DEPARTMENT as deptID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END userName, DESCRIPTION as deptName, B.TITLE, MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as imageName, B.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.DEPTID = #deptID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, userName

select.isEqual:
SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, CASE WHEN (USEFLAG = '' OR USEFLAG IS NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = 'Top'
UNION ALL
(SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, CASE WHEN (USEFLAG = '' OR USEFLAG IS NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = 'Top' ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME)
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, CASE WHEN (USEFLAG = '' OR USEFLAG IS NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = 'Top' AND CN != 'Top' ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

sqlMap.select:
SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, CASE WHEN (USEFLAG = '' OR USEFLAG IS NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptID#
UNION ALL
(SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, CASE WHEN (USEFLAG = '' OR USEFLAG IS NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #deptID# ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME)
